node.text: Thank u everyone for the birthday wishes I love you all 🥹🫶🏻
How sweet, we share the same name and my birthday is tomorrow,  happiest birthday for u cutie ^^

Thank u so much !
I really appreciate it

I want pinteresty birthday like this ✨
